zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Tyrwhitt於大約1456年出生在英國林可爾史爾凱特萊比時，他的父親Sir Robert Tyrwhitt24歲，母親Jane Waterton23歲。他於1476年之前與Anne Constable結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1491年在英國林可爾史爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1522年4月9日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrwhitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Trewhitt
meanings: English (Durham and Yorkshire): habitational name from High and Low Trewhitt in Rothbury (Northumberland). The origin of the placename is uncertain. This name has sometimes been confused with   Trevett  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Tyrwhitt was born about 1456, in Kettleby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Tyrwhitt, was 24 and his mother, Jane Waterton, was 23. He married Anne Constable before 1476. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1491, at the age of 36, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Lincolnshire, England. He died on 9 April 1522, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Tyrwhitt est né environ 1456, à Kettleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Tyrwhitt, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jane Waterton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne Constable avant 1476. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1491, à l’âge de 36 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1522, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.Kettleby House, Wrawby, North Lincolnshi: Wrawby, North Lincolnshire, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Tyrwhitt um 1456 in Kettleby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Tyrwhitt 24 und seine Mutter Jane Waterton 23. Er hat vor 1476 Anne Constable geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1491, als er 36 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament in Lincolnshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. April 1522 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tyrwhitt è nato il circa 1456 nel Kettleby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Tyrwhitt, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Jane Waterton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne Constable prima del 1476. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1491, all'età di 36 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Lincolnshire, England. Morì il 9 aprile 1522, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Tyrwhittが約1456年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアケットレビーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Tyrwhittは24歳，母Jane Watertonは23歳であった。1476年以前にAnne Constableと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1491年，36歳の時，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1522年4月9日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Kettleby House, Wrawby, North Lincolnshi: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 링코실르 롤비
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Tyrwhitt(이)가 대략 1456년 영국 링코실르 케틀레비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Tyrwhitt(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Waterton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1476년 이전 Anne Constable(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1491년, 36세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 링코실르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1522년 4월 9일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.Kettleby House, Wrawby, North Lincolnshi: Wrawby, North Lincolnshire, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tyrwhitt nasceu aproximadamente 1456, em Kettleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Tyrwhitt, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jane Waterton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Constable antes 1476. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1491, com 36 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1522, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Kettleby House, Wrawby, North Lincolnshi: равби, норт линколншир, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Tyrwhitt родился около 1456 г. в местности кеттлеби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Tyrwhitt было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Waterton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Constable перед 1476 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1491 году, в возрасте 36 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности линколншир, Англия. Он умер 9 апреля 1522 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Tyrwhitt nació aproximadamente 1456, en Kettleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Tyrwhitt, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jane Waterton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne Constable antes de 1476. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1491, a la edad de 36 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 9 de abril de 1522, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
